Title: Internal Affairs
Speaker: Auditor
Setting: Conference room B, {corp} compliance floor, fluorescent overheads and a pitcher of water nobody touches
TextLines: The auditor arrived without notice. No name on the door slate. No ID badge — just an authorization code that opened every lock between the lobby and your floor.
She's already opened a notebook. Paper. That's what makes you nervous.
"I'm not here to interview anyone yet. I'm here to walk through the last six cycles of your operational decisions and decide whether they constitute a pattern."
She slides a file across the table. Three highlighted line items. You recognize all three.
"You'll have access to your files until tomorrow at 0900. After that, custody transfers. Cooperative posture is recommended."
She smiles. It doesn't change anything else about her face.

Choices.Label: "Take whatever you need. We have nothing to hide."
"I'll have legal liaise. We'll get you everything within scope."
"There are files you won't see tonight. Walk away."
